title: My Friend
description:
Join My Friend for their San Francisco debut at The Midway for a special daytime patio party, as a part of their Across the Pond Tour, marking their first North America tour. The UK duo is known for their high-energy blend of UK Garage, House, Progressive, and Breakbeats. With top-charting releases on Anjunadeep, Armada, and Housestrike, they’ve quickly made a name for themselves on the global electronic scene.

Support:

ALMAS B2B ASENEKA

MELEVATE

ENJII B2B LEFT ON READ 

AnjunaFamily SF | Dirty Not Sorry

The Midway Patio | 21+ | 2-8PM
